boards.name: Relay Release Readiness
boards.description: Example board showing how Relay tracks local-first product work without requiring an AI session.
boards.plan:
# Relay Release Readiness

## Goal
Ship a local-first desktop planning tool that can be used manually and resumed by Codex or Claude Code.

## Current Phase
Polish And Verification

## Remaining Work
- Verify plugin enable and disable behavior.
- Package unsigned development builds on each target platform.
- Complete accessibility smoke testing with keyboard navigation and reduced motion.

cards.title: Polish Settings Modal
cards.description: Finish settings categories, scroll behavior, focus handling, and plugin controls.

notes.body: Verified desktop and narrow-window scrolling after removing measured panel height.
notes.author: Codex

cards.title: Directory Context Menus
cards.description: Support right-click and three-dot directory actions with safe destructive confirmations.

notes.body: Right-click is attached to the full directory row; keyboard-accessible menu trigger remains available.
notes.author: Codex

cards.title: Plugin Smoke Test On Real Sessions
cards.description: Install or load the Codex and Claude hooks, confirm [RELAY] Active, checkpoint progress, and verify Activity updates.

notes.body: CLI status and resume scripts are ready. Real host plugin loading still needs manual verification in installed Codex and Claude environments.
notes.author: Local User

cards.title: Signed Installer Release
cards.description: Configure certificate signing, notarization, and platform-specific release publishing.

notes.body: Blocked until distribution certificates and release credentials are available.
notes.author: Local User

phases.name: Polish And Verification
phases.objective: Close UI reliability gaps and verify local workflows.

phases.name: Plugin Verification
phases.objective: Prove Codex and Claude integrations work in real host sessions.

phases.name: Release Packaging
phases.objective: Prepare signed desktop artifacts and public release metadata.

context.title: Local-First Desktop Boundary
context.content: The renderer runs inside Electron and persists through the preload bridge. Fresh installs must not contain seed data or fabricated activity.

context.title: Integration Config
context.content: Codex and Claude integration state is stored in ~/.relay/integrations/config.json. Disabled integrations should not inject Relay startup instructions.

activity.target: Plugin Smoke Test On Real Sessions

decisions.title: Keep Fresh Installs Empty
decisions.decision: Example data lives only in docs and is never loaded automatically.
decisions.reason: Local-first user data must remain real user data.
